cards.rules_text:
Vigilance, trample
Whenever Mammon becomes tapped, create two Treasure tokens and draw two cards.
When Mammon deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards, then put up to that many lands from your hand onto the battlefield.

Untap all creatures. Creatures you control gain first strike, trample, deathtouch, and haste until end of turn. Creatures your opponents control lose indestructible until end of turn and must block this turn if able.

At the beginning of your first main phase, add {G} or {U}.
Whenever this creature becomes tapped, if it's not being declared as an attacker, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Mammon's pageant is a great spectacle for all, except the poors.[/i]
